course_title: Big Data and Machine Learning for Economics and Finance

learning_outcomes.description: Understand the concept of statistical learning.
Learn how to use the R computing framework.
Understand the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning.
Learn about some major classification techniques in machine learning.
Learn about some major regression techniques in machine learning.

assessments.assessment_title: Problem Solving, Data Analysis and Short Report
assessments.category: Computer Code, Quiz, Tutorial/ Problem Set
assessments.task_description:
Take-home quizzes throughout the semester, with the first assignment due on Friday in Week 4. There will be 6 quizzes in total.

Each quiz will consist of short-answer questions and R-exercises related to the material covered in lectures and tutorials. Students are STRICTLY REQUIRED to use R-MARKDOWN to "KNIT" a PDF file and submit it online via Blackboard.

Marks will be awarded as indicated for each question on the quiz. The top 4 scores across 6 quizzes will count toward a student's final grade for the course. Students will be given the opportunity to obtain partial marks for incorrect final answers by explaining the steps taken in the derivations and clearly identifying where the error occurred.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You cannot defer or apply for an extension for this assessment.
assessments.late_submission: You will receive a mark of 0 if this assessment is submitted late.
assessments.additional_info: You cannot defer or apply for an extension for this assessment.

assessments.due_date:
7/10/2026 2:00 pm

The exam will take place during the regular lecture time.
assessments.task_description:
This is a closed-book exam and will cover statistical learning methods up to week 8.

Marks will be shown on the paper next to each question. Up to half marks will be awarded for incorrect numerical answers, provided correct methods/formulas have been used.
assessments.submission_guidelines: You may be able to defer this exam.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to defer this exam.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to defer this exam.

assessments.task_description: The assignment will contain a set of practical and theoretical questions and cover topics from previous lectures and tutorials. Answers, including the solution to each question and the computer output, need to be provided. Students are STRICTLY REQUIRED to use R-MARKDOWN to "KNIT" a PDF file and submit it online via Blackboard.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.
